name: Wellington National Golf Club
about: Wellington National Golf Club is a premier golf and country club facility located in Wellington, Florida. It features an 18-hole championship golf course designed by two-time Major Champion Johnny Miller, offering a layout that tests golfers of all skill levels. The venue includes high-end amenities such as a golf simulator, fine dining, event spaces, and a fitness center, providing a comprehensive leisure experience for members and guests. While it operates as a membership-based club, it also offers event hosting and amenities that appeal to a wide range of visitors seeking an upscale golf and social environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Johnny Miller-designed championship course offering strategic play and beautiful landscapes
State-of-the-art golf simulator for year-round practice and game analysis
Comprehensive family-friendly amenities including a supervised children's playroom
Full-service dining options including The Bistro and Wine Bar
Membership-based community offering exclusive access and social events

food_and_drink.notes: Full dining available including Champions Bistro and kitchen facilities
Wine bar available with curated selection; no BYOB mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art golf simulator mentioned, specific brand not detailed

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental availability, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs when visiting the golf course.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned, but the club offers dining options including Champions Bistro and a wine bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The standard 18-hole round time is not specified, but it's a championship course designed to be played at a normal pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Wellington National Golf Club offers a supervised children's playroom and family-friendly amenities, making it suitable for families.
